subject: [PATCH v4 08/21] zswap: prepare zswap for swap virtualization

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch prepares the zswap code for swap virtualization by removing its dependency on range partition logic and instead using a unified zswap tree. The changes include updating the zswap.h header file to remove unused functions, modifying the swapfile.c file to remove calls to these functions, and making similar changes to the zswap.c file. This patch is part of a larger series that aims to virtualize swap space in Linux.
